Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Aug-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. KURT BOCKES, Esq. of Littler Mendelson, P.C. (tel: 415-433-1940) for Defendants Meter, Inc. and Sarah Quon.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT SARAH QUON's Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants Meter, Inc. and Sarah Quon's motion to compel arbitration is granted.

Order signed (see signed order/word minutes for complete ruling.)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
